title: Reading is Not Fun | #shorts
full_text: Mom, did you have to read when you were little? >> What read? Like read for what? >> For school or for fun? Whatever. >> For fun. Nobody reads for fun. Who does that kind of reading? >> You tell me every day I should read. I should read instead of the video. >> You're saying read the SAT prep book. Read the book about computers or read for fun. That Harry Potter so irritating. So many pages in one book. And okay, fine. That was one book. But then he came out with seven. You know how much time he wasted on magic tricks? You want a magic trick? Buy a gas station at 30, retire at 40. There's your magic trick.
